description: A designed U.S. Fire Administration / FEMA holiday fire-safety infographic in landscape format with a wintry pale-blue background; the top-right corner shows a photo of silver and white wrapped gift boxes with a gold bow and glitter. A bold white headline at top reads 'Put a FREEZE on Winter Holiday Fires' (with 'FREEZE' oversized in white and 'Winter Holiday Fires' in a white script font). The body is divided into three columns separated by thin vertical rules, using flat gray icon illustrations with red flame accents. Left column ('Did you know?' in red): a candle icon with the stat 'More than 1/3 of home decoration fires are started by candles.' Center column (red header 'As you deck the halls this season, be fire smart.'): a menorah-style row of candles icon with 'Keep candles at least 12 inches away from anything that burns.' Right column: a candle next to a battery icon reading 'Think about using battery-operated flameless candles.' Bottom-right shows agency logos: U.S. Fire Administration (eagle seal), 'Fire is Everyone's Fight,' and NFPA.
notable_text: Put a FREEZE on Winter Holiday Fires; Did you know? More than 1/3 of home decoration fires are started by candles.; Keep candles at least 12 inches away from anything that burns.; Think about using battery-operated flameless candles.
